## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run smoke:package`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`

## Security and privacy

- [ ] This change keeps the app read-only
- [ ] This change does not expose new local files
- [ ] This change does not commit real OpenClaude data, logs, screenshots, tokens, or machine-specific paths
- [ ] Redaction/path-safety behavior was reviewed or updated if relevant

## Docs

- [ ] README/docs updated if user-visible behavior changed
